utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , so anyway Beth , what I am saying is I should have considered your feelings before I went home with you that night .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I should have considered your feelings before I went home with you that night .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I have ah , I have recently learned what it like to be on your side of it , and I am sorry .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I have recently learned what it like to be on your side of it , and I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So , do you think you can forgive me ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_I have recently learned what it like to be on your side of it , and I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh hi , Mrs . Loreo , is Jennifer there ?
